name: Cole Spring Plaza
approxRentRange: $2,499/mo (2BR, 1,048 sq ft, as listed June 2026; 1BR from ~$1,775)
bathroomsNote: 2BR units confirmed at 2 bathrooms (1,048 sq ft per ApartmentList). 1BR units are 1BA.

notes.doorman: Multiple independent listing sources (RentCafe, ApartmentList, ApartmentFinder, search aggregators) consistently describe a 24-hour front desk or 24-hour concierge. Resident reviews confirm live staffing and note the concierge monitors the front entrance around the clock. Privacy concerns surfaced in one review (staff shared a resident's unit location with a visitor without consent), but 24h staffing itself is not in doubt.
notes.pool: Some aggregators (first-search summaries, ApartmentList) list a pool, but the original language on one source says 'neighboring swimming pool,' implying it may be adjacent rather than on-property. RentCafe states 'Pool: Not available at this property.' Marked Unclear pending official site confirmation.
notes.inUnitLaundry: Multiple sources consistently report shared on-site laundry facility only. ApartmentList FAQ explicitly states the property 'does not offer units with in unit laundry.' Resident reviews corroborate (and some complain about washer/dryer reliability in the shared laundry room).
notes.balcony: Private patios or balconies listed as a standard unit feature across RentCafe, ApartmentList, and search aggregators. Availability may vary by floor or unit.
notes.petFriendly: Cats only; up to 2 per household; $250 refundable deposit per cat; $25/month pet rent per cat. No dogs. Some aggregator FAQs incorrectly state 'not pet-friendly'; the cats-allowed policy is confirmed by RentCafe and the leasing summary.
notes.unitClimate: Air conditioning is listed as a unit feature. However, one resident review cited 'AC, heating, water, laundry, trash chute, and electric' as things that 'constantly break,' suggesting the systems are present in-unit but temperamental. The phrase 'most utilities included in rent' on RentCafe suggests heat may be centrally billed rather than tenant-controlled. Unit-level thermostat control over both heat and AC is not confirmed; marked Unclear.
notes.wellMaintained: Marked Unclear. Resident reviews on ApartmentRatings (paywalled, accessed via search summary) are split: positive notes cite responsive management and prompt maintenance; negative notes cite chronic HVAC, laundry, garage security, and construction-related issues. No independently verified star rating accessed. Building is a 1967 high-rise (10-12 stories, ~273 units) managed by ROSS Companies with a RentCafe rating of 4.0.
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR confirmed. No 1BR+den floor plan found. Available layouts are studio, 1BR, and 2BR.
notes.packageRoom: Package receiving services confirmed across multiple sources (RentCafe amenity list, ApartmentList).
notes.gym: Fitness center confirmed across multiple sources.
notes.buildingDetails: Built 1967; 10-12 stories; approximately 273 units; managed by ROSS Companies; Walk Score 96.
